Introduction
    High & Low: The Movie 3 - Final Mission is a movie starring Ryôhei Abe, Akira, and Shintarô Akiyama. In order to conceal past corruption by the government, the Kyuryu gang proceeds on a plan to destroy a street and build a casino....
